ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., ajax, redir) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the action does */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the action is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., url, live) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how this parameter is used */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data expected for the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the parameter is mandatory */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter if not specified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter this option belongs to */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option (e.g., ajax, toggle) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the option is the default choice */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data expected for the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the container this configuration applies to */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action being configured */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings in JSON format detailing the configuration parameters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "containers" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each container */,
  "container_name" TEXT /* Name of the container (e.g., main-content, sidebar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the container's purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the container was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the container was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the container is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form element */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form this element belongs to */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the form element (e.g., submit button, dropdown) */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the form element (e.g., button, select) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form element was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the form element is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_elements_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action being performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client that performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action this documentation applies to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the documentation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation detailing usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the documentation is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
